ensures.text: EligibleSum(a[..j + 1]) == if a[j] * 2 <= a[0] then EligibleSum(a[..j]) + a[j] else EligibleSum(a[..j])
EligibleSum(a[..j + 1]) == if a[j] * 2 <= a[0] then EligibleSum(a[..j]) + a[j] else EligibleSum(a[..j])

invariants.text: forall p: int {:trigger coalition[p]} | 0 <= p < |coalition| :: 1 <= coalition[p] && coalition[p] <= j
forall p: int, q: int {:trigger coalition[q], coalition[p]} | 0 <= p < |coalition| && 0 <= q < |coalition| && p != q :: coalition[p] != coalition[q]
forall p: int {:trigger coalition[p]} | 0 <= p < |coalition| :: coalition[p] == 1 || a[0] >= 2 * a[coalition[p] - 1]

assertions.text: forall p: int {:trigger coalition[p]} | 0 <= p < |coalition| :: coalition[p] <= j && j < j + 1

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger a[i]} | 0 <= i < n :: a[i] >= 0
